headline: MetLife Expands Settlement Offerings With New Flex Agreement And Valuation Upside
summary: MetLife (NYSE:MET) has launched a new Non-Qualified Assignment Flex Agreement to offer flexible deferred payment options for non-physical injury settlements. The product expands MetLife's role in the legal settlement market by supporting a wider range of claim types and tailored payout structures. This development focuses on settlement design and delivery for legal professionals and clients seeking customized financial arrangements. MetLife, trading at $88.84, is in the spotlight with this...
